title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Face the weakest training dummy in combat (3 turns). If victorious, obtain [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Face a medium difficulty training dummy in combat (3 turns). If victorious, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random upgradable cards from your deck.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Face the strongest training dummy in combat (3 turns). If victorious, obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
The Battleworn Dummy presents a timed training challenge featuring three difficulty settings with increasing dummy HP values. Each choice starts a combat encounter where you have [blue]3 turns[/blue] to defeat your selected dummy.

**Rewards by Setting:**
- [gold]Setting 1[/gold]: Receive [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold]
- [gold]Setting 2[/gold]: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards from your deck (only upgradable cards are selected from your full deck)
- [gold]Setting 3[/gold]: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold] from the normal relic pool

If you defeat the dummy within the 3-turn limit, you win the corresponding reward. If time runs out, the event ends in [red]humiliation[/red] with no reward, though you may continue your run without additional penalties. The three difficulty opponents are BattleFriendV1, BattleFriendV2, and BattleFriendV3 respectively.
